1592.one_line_summary: Transfer rules interface for ERC20 tokens with composable rule engine.
1592.notes: Bridges regulatory compliance with ERC20; rules externalized for reusability.

1613.one_line_summary: Gas stations network enabling gasless transactions via relayed nodes.
1613.notes: Meta-transaction network with relay nodes; compatible with EIP-1077.

1616.one_line_summary: Registry for querying attribute metadata assigned to Ethereum accounts.
1616.notes: Light-weight abstraction for account metadata; replaces ERC-735/780 complexity.

1620.one_line_summary: Money streaming using block numbers for continuous time-based payments.
1620.notes: Enables salary/subscription payments; block-time based rather than timestamp.

1633.one_line_summary: Fractional ownership of ERC-721 NFTs represented as ERC-20 fungible shares.
1633.notes: Re-Fungible Token enables shared NFT ownership via fungible token.

1710.one_line_summary: Standardized URL format for opening dapps in web3 browsers.
1710.notes: dapp:// protocol with optional chain_id parameter; avoids ethereum: conflicts.

1753.one_line_summary: Smart contract interface for government license and permit issuance.
1753.notes: Government licensing system on-chain; specific to regulatory compliance domain.

1761.one_line_summary: Scoped approval interface restricting token transfers by defined scope.
1761.notes: Generalizes approval restrictions; useful for multi-domain token systems.

1775.one_line_summary: Application-specific wallet accounts derived per dapp for isolation.
1775.notes: App keys enable per-app accounts without prompting; keccak256 based derivation.

1812.one_line_summary: Off-chain verifiable claims using EIP-712 signed typed data.
1812.notes: Reusable claims supporting delegation; avoids on-chain PII storage.

1820.one_line_summary: Universal registry for interface implementation discovery across addresses.
1820.notes: Supersedes ERC-820; fixes Solidity 0.5 incompatibility; universal deployment.

1822.one_line_summary: Universal proxy standard enabling unlimited contract upgrades via delegatecall.
1822.notes: UUPS pattern with compatibility checks; uses keccak256(PROXIABLE) storage slot.

1844.one_line_summary: ENS resolver interface for discovering contract interfaces by name.
1844.notes: Enables metadata association with ENS names/addresses via resolver.

1900.one_line_summary: Decentralized type system registry for standardizing on-chain data definitions.
1900.notes: Foundation for World Computer type system; basis for dType ecosystem.

1921.one_line_summary: Extension enabling registration of smart contract functions in dType registry.
1921.notes: Complements ERC-1900; supports pure/view function discovery and composition.
